Artist.title: Artist
Artist.description: Information about an artist or band profile

userId.description: The unique slug ID of the artist profile

name.description: The primary artistic name or band name

avatarUrl.description: Profile picture storage or web URL

bio.description: Brief biography or summary of achievements

subscriptionDate.description: ISO timestamp indicating when subscription started

Music.title: Music
Music.description: A single track uploaded to the artist repository

trackId.description: Unique identifier of the music track

artistId.description: Reference lookup linking to the artist profile UID

title.description: The name or title of the composition

composer.description: Author of the composition lyrics or melody

description.description: Brief note or pitch about the track

audioUrl.description: Firebase Storage direct music playback URL

lyrics.description: Aesthetic lyrics formatted with verses and choruses

playsCount.description: Aesthetic meter of active fan impressions

Analytics.title: Analytics
Analytics.description: Consolidated statistics counting engagement with an artist profile

artistId.description: Reference UID linking to the artist profile

viewsCount.description: Total visits logged on public page

/artists/{artistId}.description: Public and private profile data for registered composers

/artists/{artistId}/musics/{musicId}.description: Catalog of music tracks published under a specific artist profile
